issue_title: Landing page doesn't have body lock
issue_body_preview:
<!-- **IMPORTANT!**
Before reporting a bug, please make sure that you have read through our documentation and you think your problem is indeed an issue related to our module. -->

### Steps to reproduce
Go to index page and try to open mobile menu.

### What is Expected?
Body scroll lock

### What
test_description_zh: 在移动端视口下访问首页（Landing page），点击移动端菜单按钮打开导航菜单，然后尝试滚动页面背景内容，观察页面body是否可以滚动。
expected_result_zh: 打开移动端菜单后，页面背景内容应被锁定不可滚动（body scroll lock），只有菜单内部内容可以滚动；关闭菜单后页面恢复正常滚动。
